title: Remotes, Tracking, Fetch, Pull, and Push
description: Synchronize with a shared repository while separating network transfer, local integration, authentication, and authorization decisions. Learners cumulatively produce a remote synchronization trace and collaboration runbook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish remote names, URLs, remote-tracking references, local branches, upstreams, and push destinations.
Fetch explicit remotes and refspecs, inspect updates, and compare local work before integrating.
Explain pull as fetch plus configured integration and select merge, rebase, or fast-forward-only deliberately.
